entities.name: Fitbit API
entities.context: REST API accessed via Bearer token authentication for health/fitness data retrieval

entities.name: api_get_json
entities.context: Python utility function that fetches JSON from Fitbit API with retry logic for rate limits (429), 404 handling, and exponential backoff

entities.name: Rate Limiting
entities.context: HTTP 429 handling with progressive backoff strategy: 60s, 120s, 180s waits across 3 retries

entities.name: Graceful Degradation
entities.context: Pattern of returning empty dicts for missing data (404) and exhausted retries rather than crashing, allowing sync to continue

relationships.context: Fetches JSON data from Fitbit endpoints using Bearer token auth
Implements progressive backoff retry strategy when Fitbit returns 429
Returns empty dicts on 404 and retry exhaustion to avoid blocking broader sync workflows
